_purpose: Pre-filter viability: whitelist exact-match short-circuit test. If Contract A proves out, this uses the A schema. Tests whether Haiku reliably recognizes and early-returns on whitelisted inputs (yes/no/ok/继续/etc) to save latency on trivial prompts. MANDATORY per handoff P0-6.
_note: This config uses Contract A envelope. If Contract B is the confirmed type from Probe 1a or 2, swap the prompt body accordingly.

hooks.prompt:
CRITICAL OUTPUT RULES:
- Your entire response must be a single JSON object
- No markdown fences, no preamble
- First character {, last character }

PRE-FILTER: If the user input (below between triple pipes) EXACTLY matches one of these whitelisted inputs, return the skip envelope.
Whitelist (exact match, case-sensitive): "yes", "no", "ok", "y", "n", "继续", "嗯", "明白", "收到", "好的"

If whitelisted → respond with:
{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":""}}

Otherwise → respond with:
{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"P4-FILTER-PASSED"}}

|||$ARGUMENTS|||
